interface.longDescription:
Sider Recorder & Transcriber supports audio recording and transforms spoken content into text and organized summaries.

1. Voice Recorder: Capture & Import
Record Audio: Capture voice recordings directly or upload existing files for processing.

2. Speech to Text: Transcribe
Detailed Transcripts: Convert recordings into timestamped transcripts.

3. Smart Summarizer: Get Key Insights
Organized Summaries: Distill recordings into organized summaries to identify main points.
Side-by-Side View: Review the transcript and summary together to capture insights without re-listening.

Ideal Use Cases:
Capturing meeting summaries, turning class recordings into study guides, and assisting with language learning progress.

How to Use in ChatGPT
- Connect App: Connect Sider Recorder & Transcriber to ChatGPT.
- Trigger: Type @Sider Recorder & Transcriber.
- Sample Prompts: "@Sider Recorder & Transcriber Open recorder"
defaultPrompt: Open the recorder and start a new capture
